command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 'sudo sed -i "s|- Security:|- Monitoring:
    - Uptime Kuma:
        href: http://192.168.0.201/uptime
        description: Service Monitoring
        icon: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/walkxcode/dashboard-icons/png/uptime-kuma.png
- Security:|" /home/jose/homepage/config/services.yaml && echo HOMEPAGE_UPDATED'
